stemHtml: Preventing hypoxia at altitude is achieved by…

options.a: pressurising the air inside the aircraft to achieve oxygen saturation in the blood of more than 90%.
options.b: reducing the contents of carbon dioxide by filtering the cabin air.
options.c: pressurising the air inside the aircraft to maintain oxygen saturation in the blood of 30%.
options.d: hyperventilating to increase the intake of oxygen, trading oxygen for carbon dioxide.
